operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV System and Map Status Explanation
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain the difference between AGVs in the system and on the map
operational_intents: Clarify AGV status in system vs map
Describe how AGVs appear when turned off or removed
Explain implications of AGVs not added to map
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by AGV system and map status discussion
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Distinct topic on AGV system vs map presence

operational_scenes.scene_title: Sign-in Sheet and Robot Count Overview
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss sign-in process and robot count details
operational_intents: Describe robot counts in system and map
Discuss reasons for removing AGVs from system
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by sign-in and robot count operational details
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Shift from AGV status to administrative and count details

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Removal Procedures and Tote Handling
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain proper procedures for removing AGVs and associated totes
operational_intents: Describe sequence for removing AGV and tote
Highlight common errors in removal process
Introduce upcoming training on removal procedures
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by AGV removal and tote handling instructions
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focused operational process on AGV and tote removal

operational_scenes.scene_title: Soft Emergency Stop and System Pause Functionality
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe the soft emergency stop feature and its effects
operational_intents: Explain difference between soft and actual emergency stop
Detail behavior of AGVs during soft stop
Explain how to restart system after soft stop
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by emergency stop feature explanation

operational_scenes.scene_title: Map Icons and Path Visualization Features
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Introduce map icons and path visualization tools
operational_intents: Show how to view AGV paths on map
Explain station IDs and their importance
Describe charger IDs and map object selection
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Segment by map interface and icon usage explanation
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focused on map interaction and debugging tools
